base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_dracula_final_keep — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 castlevania. Dracula's Keep tileset (Level 7) — dark purple/blue stones, throne-room decor, ominous palette. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dracula's Keep tileset (Level 7) — dark purple/blue stones, throne-room decor, ominous palette; smaller tile set than main levels since level is short
